title: Hello Harmozi
name: HelloHarmozi
author: Carmelo Santana
description: A random Alex Hormozi quote in your footer. A Hello Dolly homage.

title: ModMenu
name: ModMenu
author: Carmelo Santana
description: A standalone plugin manager: browse, install, upload, enable/disable, update, and uninstall Kanboard plugins.

title: Shadcn Theme
name: ShadcnTheme
author: Carmelo Santana
description: Modern Kanboard theme inspired by shadcn/ui design principles with light/dark mode toggle and system preference detection.

title: Bulk Project Delete
name: BulkProjectDelete
author: Carmelo Santana
description: Bulk-delete multiple projects in one action.

title: Feature Sync
name: FeatureSync
author: Carmelo Santana
description: Bulk-copy project features (actions, tags, columns, categories, swimlanes) from a source project to many target projects, with add-missing and replace modes and a read-only diff preview.

title: Subtask Generator
name: SubtaskGenerator
author: Carmelo Santana
description: Generate subtasks from a task description using an AI provider (Anthropic, OpenAI, or Grok).

title: Calendar
name: CalendarPlugin
author: Carmelo Santana
description: Drag-and-drop calendar view: tasks by due date, across all projects or per project. Month and agenda views, unscheduled sidebar, filters, and overdue highlighting.

title: Dependency
name: DependencyPlugin
author: Carmelo Santana
description: Task dependencies built on core task links: blocked/blocker badges on board cards, calendar events, and the task page, plus a cycle guard. Calendar badges require CalendarPlugin >= 1.1.0.

title: Scheduler
name: SchedulerPlugin
author: Carmelo Santana
description: Automatically rolls overdue tasks forward on a daily sweep, per opt-in project: working-days and de-clump policies, skip-blocked (DependencyPlugin), audit log, per-run activity summary, and a calendar auto-moved badge. Calendar badge requires CalendarPlugin >= 1.1.0.
